last_completed_round.direction_name: Restore the last correct round-2 branch `06eedc6` and continue from the validated streaming-B + B-lookahead surface
last_completed_round.hypothesis: If the A-side lookahead cannot be repaired quickly, the right fallback is to stop paying correctness risk and restore the last correct branch. Round 2 already recovered the streaming-B branch and added the one-fragment B-side Ps2r lookahead while keeping correctness. Resetting there preserves the strongest valid exploratory surface for the remaining rounds instead of continuing from a broken commit.

notes: Completed round 4/30. Continue with node_b for round 5/30. Accepted base: 20260419_221014_bf16_gemm_v1_5dd9f0d at 29.432832 ms.
